mechanics.excerpt: Travel (41 STAGE 4: REAL LIFE Once character has finished school ad training; the real challenge making living begins_ Depending on your earlier path choices your character has several different options at this stage As with the Higher Education Stage the Real Life Stage is optional; however, most characters should go through it at least once or they will be totally green when play begins Time: Real Life Paths take variable amounts of time depending on the contents of each path The number of years each path takes is listed under its Time heading: Repeats: After completing path in this stage characters who meet the prerequisites may continue in that path, move difterent Real Life Path or return to Stage 3: Higher Education_ following the Next Path restrictions as usual.
